name: Apple Walnut Strudel
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core and chop apples.
2. Combine apples, walnuts and lemon juice in a mixing bowl; fold to mix.
3. Melt margarine.
4. Place 2 phyllo leaves on a lightly dampened, lightly bread-crumbed cloth.
5. Brush leaves lightly with melted margarine.
6. Lay a second leaf on top of each leaf.
7. Brush each layer lightly with melted margarine.
8. Repeat using all the leaves.
9. Place apple filling 2 inches from long edges.
10. Fold long edges in over the filling.
11. Fold over the ends.
12. Roll up dough, jelly-roll fashion.
13. Score top into 10 pieces with a sharp knife or scissors.
14. Place on greased cookie sheet.
15. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes, or until lightly browned.
